meta.title: The Hunt for the King of the Dark Web
meta.description:
Check out https://nordvpn.com/ferntv/ for an Exclusive Deal on a 2-Year-Plan. Code: "FERNTV" (AD)

The operator of a dark web market becomes one of the most wanted men in the world. In a spectacular operation, the authorities try to bring him down.

Wired Story on the King of the Dark Web: https://www.wired.com/story/alphabay-series-part-1-the-shadow/
Darknet Diaries Episode on Operation Bayonet: https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/24/

Original video: https://youtu.be/KlgjEGd-Gmk

This video originally appeared on our German channel Simplicissimus. We will occasionally translate some of our best videos, as many of them are relevant for a wider international audience as well. Those translations will help us drop more videos and at the same time help us finance more original content on this channel. Enjoy the story.

Sources: 
https://docs.google.com/document/d/11Cklk96i_SnpxsiTuMDSvTzkkMraoJ4qoSUnxiBhHQc/edit?usp=sharing
